briefdescription.para: Flush the page buffer to flash.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_FwUpdate *upd, uint32_t slot_addr, uint32_t max_size, uint8_t *page_buf, uint16_t page_buf_size)
memberdef.name: syn_fwupdate_begin

detaileddescription.para: Erases the first sector of the target slot and prepares for writing. The image header is written at slot_addr; image data starts at slot_addr + sizeof(SYN_FwImageHeader).

parameterdescription.para: Flash base address of the target slot.
Maximum image size in bytes (excl. header).
Buffer size (should match flash write granularity).

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR on flash erase failure.

briefdescription.para: Write a chunk of firmware data.

detaileddescription.para: Data is buffered until a full page is ready, then flushed to flash. Automatically erases sectors as needed.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR on flash write failure or overflow.

detaileddescription.para: Flushes any remaining buffered data, verifies the CRC-32 matches the expected value, and writes the image header with state = NEW.

parameterdescription.para: Expected CRC-32 of the full image.
Version code for the new image.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK if verification passes and header written, SYN_ERROR on mismatch or flash failure.

detaileddescription.para: Marks the slot as INVALID and cleans up.
